prompt: I have an APDL script called thermal_model.inp and a MAPDL instance already running on port 50060. How do I send that script to the running instance from my terminal?

assertions.text: Uses pymapdl exec (not pymapdl run or other command)
Includes --file flag with the script name
Includes --port 50060 to target the correct instance
Explains that exec connects to an already-running instance
assertions.value: explains connecting to existing running instance
